# Wholeup - Digital Marketing Agency in India

Wholeup is a conversion-first digital marketing agency in India specializing in SEO, paid advertising, web design, and AI automation.

## Core Services
- **Search Engine Optimization (SEO)**: Local SEO, Google Business Profile (GMB) optimization, organic keyword rank building.
- **Google Ads & Meta Ads (PPC)**: High-ROAS campaigns, conversion rate optimization (CRO), Meta Pixel integration.
- **Web Development**: Responsive, fast-loading corporate websites and landing pages with custom UI systems.
- **WhatsApp & AI Automation**: WhatsApp marketing automation, dynamic lead capture, automated AI chatbots.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://wholeup.in
- Phone/WhatsApp: +91 97251 37538
- Email: wholeup.agency@gmail.com
- Main Location: Surat, Gujarat, India
